title: duvalia gracilis
intro: Duvalia gracilis, also known as the 'Starfish Cactus', is a type of flowering cactus that belongs to the Asclepiadaceae family. Traditionally, Duvalia gracilis has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits associated with Duvalia gracilis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Duvalia gracilis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
